html:
Exclusive to:
Crop Seeds are a specialized version of Seeds, used primarily for Farming. In Don't Starve Together, Crop Seeds have different visuals but they have the same functionality as in Don't Starve. Initially, Crop Seeds have an assumed name related to their shape. Once the player has accumulated enough knowledge by researching the Farm Plant with a Gardeneer Hat, their name changes to the regular name.

They are obtained by harvesting Farm Plants, by hammering Giant Vegetables or by feeding a Farm Plant crop to a caged Bird. The Birdcage drops 1 seed per crop. The Lord of the Fruit Flies drops 4 to 8 plant seeds upon death.

There is a 33% chance that Carrats will drop Carrot Seeds upon death. Durian, Eggplant, Pumpkin, Onion, Garlic and Pepper seeds can be obtained by trading with a King of the Merms.

When eaten, Crop Seeds provide 0.5 Health and 9.375 Hunger. Like regular Seeds, Crop Seeds spoil in 40 days, and they turn into Toasted Seeds when cooked.

The Seed Pack-It will slow spoilage of any contained seeds by 50%.

Contents

  • 1 All Crop Seeds
  • 2 Oblong Seeds
  • 3 Clustered Seeds
  • 4 Bulbous Seeds
  • 5 Brittle Seed Pods
  • 6 Swirly Seeds
  • 7 Windblown Seeds
  • 8 Sharp Seeds
  • 9 Square Seeds
  • 10 Tubular Seeds
  • 11 Spiky Seeds
  • 12 Fluffy Seeds
  • 13 Pointy Seeds
  • 14 Lumpy Seeds
  • 15 Seed Pods

All Crop Seeds

Main article: Farming/DST#Summary

Don't Starve
Together
Exclusive to:
Crop Seeds are a specialized version of Seeds, used primarily for Farming. In Don't Starve Together, Crop Seeds have different visuals but they have the same functionality as in Don't Starve. Initially, Crop Seeds have an assumed name related to their shape. Once the player has accumulated enough knowledge by researching the Farm Plant with a Gardeneer Hat, their name changes to the regular name.
They are obtained by harvesting Farm Plants, by hammering Giant Vegetables or by feeding a Farm Plant crop to a caged Bird. The Birdcage drops 1 seed per crop. The Lord of the Fruit Flies drops 4 to 8 plant seeds upon death.
There is a 33% chance that Carrats will drop Carrot Seeds upon death. Durian, Eggplant, Pumpkin, Onion, Garlic and Pepper seeds can be obtained by trading with a King of the Merms.
When eaten, Crop Seeds provide 0.5 Health and 9.375 Hunger. Like regular Seeds, Crop Seeds spoil in 40 days, and they turn into Toasted Seeds when cooked.
The Seed Pack-It will slow spoilage of any contained seeds by 50%.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Crop Seeds là phiên bản chuyên dụng của Seeds, được sử dụng chủ yếu cho việc Farming. Trong Don't Starve Together, Crop Seeds có hình ảnh khác nhau nhưng chúng có chức năng tương tự như trong Don't Starve. Ban đầu, Crop Seeds có một cái tên giả liên quan đến hình dạng của chúng. Sau khi người chơi đã tích lũy đủ kiến ​​thức bằng cách nghiên cứu Cây trồng trong Nông trại với Mũ Người làm vườn, tên của họ sẽ thay đổi thành tên thông thường.
title: Crop Seeds/DST
wikitext:
{{Navbutton/Separation}} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} '''Crop Seeds''' are a specialized version of [[Seeds/DST|Seeds]], used primarily for [[Farm Plant|Farming]]. In ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', Crop Seeds have different visuals but they have the same functionality as in ''[[Don't Starve]]''. Initially, Crop Seeds have an assumed name related to their shape. Once the player has accumulated enough knowledge by researching the [[Farm Plant]] with a [[Gardeneer Hat]], their name changes to the regular name. They are obtained by harvesting [[Farm Plant]]s, by hammering [[Giant Vegetables]] or by feeding a Farm Plant crop to a [[Birdcage|caged]] Bird. The Birdcage drops 1 seed per crop. The [[Lord of the Fruit Flies]] drops 4 to 8 plant seeds upon death. There is a 33% chance that [[Carrat]]s will drop [[Carrot]] Seeds upon death. [[Durian]], [[Eggplant]], [[Pumpkin]], [[Onion]], [[Garlic]] and [[Pepper]] seeds can be obtained by trading with a [[King of the Merms]]. When eaten, Crop Seeds provide 0.5 [[Health]] and 9.375 [[Hunger]]. Like regular Seeds, Crop Seeds spoil in 40 days, and they turn into [[Toasted Seeds]] when cooked. The [[Seed Pack-It]] will slow spoilage of any contained seeds by 50%. ==All Crop Seeds== {{main|Farming/DST#Summary}} {| class="wikitable" |+ Crop Seeds and Corresponding Crops |- ! Crop Seed Name !!
